steps.title: Find the hypotenuse
steps.content:
The figure gives a right triangle with legs $3$ and $4$. Use the Pythagorean theorem to find the hypotenuse $MP$.
$$MP^2=3^2+4^2=9+16=25$$
$$MP=5$$

steps.title: Compare the two areas
steps.content:
The same triangle area can be written using the legs or using hypotenuse $MP$ with altitude $NQ$.
$$\frac{1}{2}(3)(4)=\frac{1}{2}(5)(NQ)$$
